name: Cash Exchange Antiques & More
description_short: Cash Exchange Antiques & More is a pawn shop located on W Washington St in Indianapolis offering collateral-based loans and antique merchandise.
description_long:
Cash Exchange Antiques & More operates as a pawn shop in Indianapolis, Indiana, serving the local community with financial services backed by tangible collateral. The business is situated at 6659 W Washington St in Indianapolis, IN 46241, positioning it as a neighborhood-accessible lending option in the west side area. Pawn shops like this have historically served as an alternative financial resource for consumers seeking quick access to cash without credit checks or underwriting requirements.

The company offers collateral-based lending services typical of pawn operations, where customers can exchange personal items of value for immediate cash. The business maintains regular operating hours throughout the week, opening at 9:00 AM on most days and closing between 4:00 PM and 5:00 PM, making it accessible during standard business hours. Contact is available directly at (317) 241-2200 for customer inquiries about loan terms, item valuations, or redemption questions.

Cash Exchange Antiques & More distinguishes itself by operating as an antiques dealer alongside its pawn operations, suggesting the business may carry a curated inventory of antique merchandise acquired through pawn transactions. This dual model allows customers to both access quick cash loans and potentially browse antique inventory, differentiating it from pawn shops that focus exclusively on lending. The company name emphasis on "Antiques & More" indicates merchandise diversification beyond typical pawn shop stock.

Pawn shops serve a legitimate but specialized financial niche. They provide immediate liquidity for consumers in urgent cash situations without requiring credit approval, but come with the inherent risk of losing personal property if loans cannot be repaid. Customers should carefully evaluate whether pawning items aligns with their financial situation, as interest rates and storage fees can be substantial. The lack of detailed service information on the current web presence limits ability to assess specific loan terms, redemption policies, or fee structures.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Located in accessible neighborhood location on W Washington St in Indianapolis
Maintains consistent operating hours seven days per week (9 AM weekdays, 9 AM weekends)
Direct phone contact available at (317) 241-2200 for customer service inquiries
No credit check or underwriting required for collateral-based loans
Dual business model offers both pawn lending and antique merchandise sales
Immediate cash access without application process or funding delays
Extended business hours until 5 PM weekdays accommodates working customers
cons: Website provides minimal information about loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures
Risk of permanent loss of personal property if redemption period expires
No details available regarding loan duration, renewal policies, or default consequences
Limited transparency about how items are valued or what categories of merchandise are accepted
No information about storage fees, insurance fees, or total cost of borrowing
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with no credit check or approval process
Individuals with valuable items they can temporarily spare in exchange for quick liquidity
Antique shoppers seeking curated secondhand merchandise at potential discount prices
People in temporary financial situations who plan to redeem pawned items within standard timeframes
diagnosis: Cash Exchange Antiques & More is best suited for consumers in temporary cash emergencies who have valuable personal items they can pledge as collateral and expect to redeem within standard pawn redemption periods. The primary caveat is the inherent risk of permanent loss of pledged items combined with a complete lack of published information about loan terms, fees, or interest rates—customers must contact the business directly to understand the true cost and terms of borrowing.
services: Gold and jewelry buying (typical for pawn shops)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
